name: Guardian's Stance
description: You can perform *Shield* **Actions**. You have a **Block Rating** equal to 4+[tier].

name: Raise Shield
description: Until the start of your next turn, attacks against you have **+1 Disadvantage** and you have the **Block Reaction**.

name: Raise Shield: Block
description:
**Condition:** You are targeted by an **Attack** that gains **+1 Disadvantage** from **Raise Shield**.
**Effect:** Gain **Barrier** equal to your **Block Rating**. If you have no **Barrier** remaining after the attack, you can't use this *Reaction* for the rest of the encounter.

name: Entrenched
description: Hostile characters treat tiles adjacent to you as **Difficult Terrain**.

name: Shove
description:
Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and becomes **Prone.**
**Resist:** **Push 1**.

name: Ultimate: Absolute Defense
description: Clear **Prone.** Clear **Immobilized**. **Teleport** to a free space adjacent to an allied character. Until the start of your next turn, you and that character are **Invulnerable**.

name: Devotion Aura
description: Allied characters within your **Aura** have **+1 Advantage** on **Resistance Rolls**.

name: Defensive Reflexes
description: Perform a *Shield* **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less. You're **Stunned +1**. This **Condition** can't be prevented.

name: Pavise
description: Allied characters within your **Aura** can use you as **Cover**.

name: Shield Slam
description: **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone**.

name: Guardian
description:
**Condition:** An hostile character within **Range** of a  *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs **2 AP** or less performs an *Action* targeting a character other than you.
**Effect:** Perform that *Melee Attack* **Action** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

name: Shield Charge
description:
Perform the *Basic* **Move Action**.
During this *Movement:* You can't change directions, have **Damage Resistance**, and ignore **Difficult Terrain**.
At the end of this *Movement:* Perform a *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less as a **Free Action**. It deals **+3 Bonus Damage**.

name: Shield Mastery
description: You have **Block Rating** +2.

name: Radiance
description:
Your *Aura* is a **Size 2 Area**, though characters outside your **Line of Effect** gain no benefits.
You also gain the **Prominence** *Special* **Action**.

name: Radiance: Prominence
description: Until the start of your next turn, your *Aura* is a **Size 3 Area**, though characters outside your **Line of Effect** gain no benefits.

name: Fortify
description: Until the start of your next turn, you have **+1 Armor** and **Immunity to Involuntary Movement.**

name: Formation Fighting
description:
**Condition:** An allied character takes damage.
**Effect:** The damaged character may perform a *Basic* **Move Action** as a **Free Reaction**. This movement must move as far as possible towards you by the shortest available path.

name: Indefatigable
description: Whenever **Barrier, Damage Resistance, or Invulnerability** affects the amount of damage you take: Recover **1 Focus**.

name: Aegis
description: **Under Construction**.

name: Smite
description:
**Condition:** An allied character makes a successful attack against a hostile character adjacent to you.
**Effect - Focus Cost 2:** Choose one:
- The attack does [tier]+2 **Bonus Damage**.
- The attacker receives [tier]+2 **Healing**.

name: Rampart
description:
You create a **Rampart**, a line of five contiguous tiles where all five share an edge and the centermost is adjacent to you. It lasts until the end of your next turn. Your **Rampart** has the following properties:

- You and allied characters have **Damage Resistance** against attacks that draw **Line of Effect** through the **Rampart**.
- A hostile character that begins a turn in a tile adjacent to or occupied by the **Rampart** makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Immobilized 1**. 
- You have **Maximum Speed: 1** and can't perform *Movement* **Actions** other than the *Basic* **Move Action**. *(The Rampart moves with you.)*

**Sustain** (0 AP): **Focus Cost 2**

name: Blessed Armor
description: The damage of the first successful *Attack* against you each round is reduced by 5 before all other forms of resistance and armor.

name: Shove
description:
Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and becomes **Prone.**
**Resist:** **Push 1**.

name: Toughness
description: **Passive:** +2 Maximum HP.

name: Shield Stance
description: You can perform *Shield* **Actions**. You have a **Block Rating** equal to 4+[tier] and the **Raise Shield** *Special* **Action**.

name: Grapple
description:
**On Hit**: You are **Grappling**, and the target is **Restrained**. *(They're special Statuses that exist in a pair.)*
- The **Grappling** character can't perform **Grapple**, and can't perform more than one *Movement* **Action** in a turn. That character can clear this status as a **Free Action**.
- The **Restrained** character is **Immobilized** and mirrors the **Grappling** character's movement as involuntary movement. That character has (**1AP**) **Resistance Roll (10):** Clear the status.
The status is cleared any time the characters are no longer adjacent, either character is reduced to 0 HP, or there is a difference in elevation between the characters.

name: Stampede
description:
You can attempt to move into a hostile character's space. When you do, that character makes a **Resistance Roll**. If the character **Resists**, your *Movement* ends. Otherwise, you move into that space, but can't end your turn there.
A **Prone** character automatically fails the **Resistance Roll**.

name: Improved Toughness
description: **Passive:** +4 Maximum HP.

name: Armor Mastery
description: **Passive:** +1 Armor *(max. 2)*

name: Ironskin
description: **Passive:** +1 DEF

name: Gladiator Stance
description: *Non-Spell* **Action** **Focus Cost -1** *(min. 1).*

name: Ranged Stance
description: In **Ranged Stance**, you can perform *Ranged Weapon Attack* **Actions**. Your *Basic* **Attack Action** is *Ranged* and has **Range 4**.

name: Shield Stance
description: You can perform *Shield* **Actions**. You have a **Block Rating** equal to 4+[tier] and the **Raise Shield** *Special* **Action**.

name: Rearm
description:
Change an active *Stance* to another *Stance* available to you.
Then, you may perform a *Weapon, Ranged Weapon, or Shield* **Action** that shares a tag with your current **Stance**.
That **Action's AP Cost** is reduced by 1 *(min. 1).*

name: Ultimate: Unstoppable
description:
Gain **1 AP**. It can't be spent on *Spell* **Actions**. Gain **Barrier** ***x***, where ***x*** is half your maximum HP. This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end. Clear **Prone.** Clear any number of **Conditions** of your choice. For each adjacent character, choose: that character falls **Prone** or suffers **Push 1**.
**For the rest of the encounter:** You can perform an additional **Reaction** during each character's turn, and you have **Start of Turn:** Gain **1 AP**. It can't be spent on *Spell* **Actions**.

name: Second Wind
description:
**Passive:** Increased **Focus Pool (+1)**.

**1/Encounter:** When you **Refocus**, apply **Healing** to yourself equal to half your maximum HP.

name: Focus Attack
description:
**Flurry**

**+1 Advantage**

name: Mighty Attack
description:
**Bind** to a *non-Spell Attack* **Action**.
The **Bound** *Attack* has **+1 Disadvantage** and **+1 Bonus Damage**. When dealing damage with the **Bound** *Attack*, roll all damage dice twice and use the highest results.

name: Shield Stagger
description: **While you're in a** *Shield* **Stance:** Whenever an adjacent hostile character damages your **Barrier**, that character suffers **Push 1** and **Off Guard**.

name: Attack of Opportunity
description:
**Condition:** An hostile character within **Range** of a  *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs **2 AP** or less performs a *Movement* **Action**.
**Effect:** Perform that *Melee Attack* **Action** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

name: Bash
description: **Bash** has **+1 Advantage** against **Slowed, Prone, or Immobilized** characters and deals +3 **Bonus Damage** to those characters.

name: Duelist's Parry
description:
Perform this **Action** only while in a non-*Shield Stance*.
Until the start of your next turn, you have **DEF +1**.

name: Battle Charge
description:
Move up to twice your **Speed**.
During this *Movement:* You can't change directions, have **Damage Resistance**, and ignore **Difficult Terrain**.
At the end of this *Movement:* Adjacent hostile characters are **Slowed 1**. *(No roll.)*

name: Battle High
description: You may **Recover 1 Focus** on a hit with a *Basic Melee* **Attack Action**.

name: Sunder
description: Your next **Attack Action** has **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Sundered 1**.

name: Shockwave
description:
Characters in a **Cleave 3** area make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer 2[A]+3 **DMG** and fall **Prone,** or become **Immobilized 1** if already **Prone.**
A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't **Prone** or **Immobilized.**

name: Indomitable
description:
**Condition:** You fail a **Resistance Roll.**

**Effect - Focus Cost 2:** Reroll that **Resistance Roll** and use the new result.

name: Flagbearer
description:
**Condition:** An adjacent allied character becomes the target of an **Action** that targets only one character.

**Effect ďż˝ Focus Cost 1:** You become the new target of that **Action.** *( It's applied even if you're outside the action's normal range. )*

name: Onslaught
description: Perform the *Basic* **Attack Action** with **Flurry** as a **Free Action** four times.

name: Demolisher's Art
description: You gain one use of the **Craterize** *Special* **Action.** Until you perform **Craterize,** you can't perform other *Weapon* or *Attack* **Actions** and can't perform more than one *Movement* **Action** each turn.

name: Demolisher's Art: Craterize
description:
Perform **Craterize** only during a **Delayed Turn** and only with **Initiative.**

- **On Attack:** Characters adjacent to the target make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer the attack's full damage, or half damage on a **Resist**.
- Each character damaged by **Craterize** becomes **Prone**, or **Immobilized 1** if already **Prone**.

name: Shadowbringer
description:
Roll **1d6**. You take that much **Piercing Chaos Damage**.
The first *Attack* you make as part of any *Attack* **Action** this turn deals that much **Bonus Damage** on a hit.

name: Taunt
description:
Target hostile character is **Taunted 1**.
*(+1 Disadvantage on Attack Rolls against characters other than you as long as you're not Staggered, Invulnerable, or otherwise untargetable.)*

name: Grit
description:
While **Battered**, you have **Damage Resistance**.

**1/Encounter:** The first time **Shadowbringer** would bring you to 0 or less HP, your HP becomes your **Battered** threshold.

name: Ultimate: Call of the Void
description:
**Condition:** Damage dealt by a hostile character would reduce your **HP** to 0 or less.
**Effect:** Gain **Exmortis**. *(It's a special Status.)*
**Exmortis** has the following effect: You regenerate **Turn AP** and can perform **Actions** normally while at 0 or less HP. You have **+1 Advantage** on all **Action Resolutions**. Characters can't **Aid** you, and you can't gain HP in any way. If you would take any amount of damage, ignore that damage and become **Stunned +1**.
If you're **Stunned 3** or greater at the start of your turn, **Exmortis** ends and your **HP** becomes 1 if it's less than 1.

name: Bloodletting
description: You suffer **Piercing Chaos Damage** equal to the number of **Conditions** affecting you that aren't self-inflicted.Then, choose one of those **Conditions** and make a **Resistance Roll** (10). On a **Resist,** clear that **Condition.**

name: Mocking Blow
description:
**Flurry**
**On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Taunted 1.**

name: The Greatest Teacher
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within the range of your *Basic* **Study Action** deals damage to you or an allied character adjacent to you.
**Effect:** Perform the *Basic* **Study Action** against the triggering character as part of this **Reaction.**

name: Crisis Core
description: **While Battered:** The first *Attack* you make as part of each *Attack* **Action** you perform deals **+2** **Bonus Damage** on a hit.

name: Fight or Flight
description: **While Battered:** You have **+1 Speed.**

name: Heavy Stance
description: You have **+1 Attack** and **All In**.

name: Revenge
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within the **Range** of an available *Melee Attack* **Action** inflicts a harmful **Condition** on you.
**Effect:** Perform that *Melee Attack* **Action** on the triggering character before the **Condition** is inflicted.

name: Hatred
description:
**Until the end of your next turn:** Hostile characters within your **Aura** have **+1 Disadvantage** on **Resistance Rolls.**
**Sustain - Focus Cost:** 1

name: Menace
description: **Taunted** you apply doesn't Decay on a character unless that character targets you or forces you to make a **Resistance Roll** with any **Action** during their turn.

name: Eye for an Eye
description: When you take damage from a hostile character, recover 1 **Focus**.

name: Scraps of Life
description:
**Condition:** An adjacent allied character takes damage.
**Effect:** Prevent that damage. You take that much **Piercing Chaos Damage.**

name: Intimidation Tactics
description: Your *Attack* **Actions** have **+1 Advantage** against **Taunted, Poisoned,** or **Bleeding** characters.

name: Conjure Reflection
description:
Conjure **Reflection** in an adjacent free tile. **Reflection** is **Legendary,** can perform *Basic* **Move** and **Attack Actions** using your **AP**, and doesn't provoke **Reactions.**

**Reflection** (**ATK** d6, **MAG** d6, **HP** N/A, **DEF** Yours, **SPD** Yours, **FP** 0) **1/Round**: When you inflict a **Condition** on a hostile character: **Reflection** performs an **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less as a **Free Action**.

If **Reflection** would take damage, instead, you take that damage. **Reflection** is removed from play when you become **Downed.** **Reflection** is **Invulnerable** to sources of damage that affect multiple characters.

name: Enchainment
description:
Target any number of hostile characters. 

**For each target beyond the first:** **Focus Cost: +1**.
- **On Hit:** The target is **Pulled** as close to you as possible.

name: Frightening Aspersion
description:
When you inflict **Taunted, Poisoned,** or **Bleeding** to a hostile character, also inflict **Stunned +1.**
Each hostile character can only be **Stunned** by **Frightening Aspersion** once per encounter.

name: Attack
description: *(During your turn, Attack **Actions** have **+1 Disadvantage** for each other Attack **Action** performed this turn. An Attack **Action** with the **Flurry** property is exempt from this characteristic.)*

name: Move
description: **Choose one:** **Move** **Speed**, or clear **Prone**.

name: Aid
description:
While you are adjacent to an allied character, you can **Aid** that character. **Choose one:**
- **Describe how you aid that character. At the GM's discretion: **Make an **Action Resolution** (DV 10). If you succeed, that character's next **Action Resolution** that benefits from your aid **during their next turn** has **+1 Advantage.** *(This effect does not stack with repeated uses of the Aid action from a single character or with Aid actions from multiple characters.)*
- That character may clear **Prone** as a **Reaction**.
- That character clears **Staggered.**

name: Study
description:
Target a character within **Range 4.** Choose one of the following:
ďż˝ You learn that character's remaining HP and defenses.
ďż˝ You learn the character's attacks and abilities.
ďż˝ At the GM's discretion, you learn a piece of useful information about the character.

name: Evade
description: **Move 1. **Performing **Evade** doesn't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

name: Refocus
description: Recover one third of your maximum **Focus.** Clear **Off Guard.**

name: Deadly
description: **Each round,** your first hit with a *Weapon Attack* **Action** deals **+2 Bonus Damage** to one target.

name: Flanking
description:
You have **+1 Advantage** on *Melee Attack Actions* against a character you are *Flanking*.
*(You are Flanking a character if you and an allied character are in melee range of, and on opposite sides of that character. A line drawn from the center of your tile to the center of the ally's tile must pass through opposite corners or sides of the flanked character's tile. It's a special Status.)*

name: Assault
description:
**Bind** to a *non-Basic Attack* **Action**. *( When you begin a Quest, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to. )*
The **Bound** *Attack* is a **Combo Action** with **Focus Cost +1.**

name: Battle Stance
description: You have **+1 Attack**.

name: Staggering Blow
description:
**Bind** to a *non-Basic Attack* **Action**. *( When you begin a Quest, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to. )*
The **Bound** *Attack* has **Finisher:** +3 **Bonus Damage.** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone.**

name: Fool's Gambit
description: **This turn**, your next non-*Basic,* non-*Finisher* *Weapon Attack* **Action** is a *Combo* **Action** and costs 1 AP less *(min. 0)*.

name: Sneak
description:
Perform **Sneak** only if you're not adjacent to any hostile characters, and only while adjacent to cover or terrain that grants cover.
You gain **Concealment 3.** It lasts until you take damage or perform any **Action** or **Reaction.**

name: Fleetfoot
description: **+1 Speed.**

name: True Charge
description:
When you **Delay**, you may initiate a **True Charge,** which has the following properties:
- Until your **Delayed** turn begins, if you would take any amount of damage from a single source, you may gain **Damage Resistance** against that damage. Activate this effect only once per **True Charge.**
- At the beginning of your **Delayed** turn, you may perform the *Basic* **Evade Action** as a **Free Action**.
- The first *Melee Attack* **Action** you perform during your **Delayed** turn deals **+2 Bonus Damage** on a hit.

name: Draw Strike
description: Your *Melee Weapon Attack* **Actions** have **Initiative:** The **Attack Roll** has **+1 Advantage.** *( An Action activates its Initiative effects if it's your turn and your first AP is spent on that Action. )*

name: Phasing
description: During *Movement*, you can move through hostile characters. You still provoke Reactions.

name: Final Judgment
description:
Perform **Final Judgement** only during a **Delayed** turn.

As part of this **Action,** perform a *Basic Melee Attack* **Action** against any number of characters within **Range 12**, as long as an unobstructed path of any distance exists through which you could move to that character. These attacks can't be prevented and don't trigger **Reactions.** Attacks made this way have **Flurry,** **+1 Advantage,** and **On Hit:** **+3 Bonus Damage**. Each character targeted this way can only be hit by one successful attack.

You **Teleport** to a free tile within **Range 12.**

name: Wind Dance
description: When your *Weapon Attack* **Action** misses all targets: **Focus Cost 1** - Repeat the missed *Attack* **Action** as a **Free Action**.

name: Whirlwind Strike
description: Perform the **Attack Roll** against all hostile characters within **Range**.

name: Hidden Step
description: Perform a *Basic Evade* **Action**. You're **Stunned +1**--it can't be prevented.

name: True Strike
description: The first **Attack Roll** you make for the first *Weapon Attack* **Action** you perform during each of your turns has **+1 Advantage**.

name: Heavy Stance
description: You have **+1 Attack** and **All In**.

name: Parry
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character would deal non-**Piercing** damage to you.
**Effect:** Gain [Attack] **Barrier**, which can reduce the triggering damage. If this **Barrier** is depleted by damage, you are **Stunned +1.**

name: Savage Edge
description:
Your next *Weapon Attack* **Action** this turn has the following property:
**On Hit:** Up to one target makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Bleeding 3**.
The character suffers **Bleeding +1** on a **Resist**.

name: Flicker Step
description: Teleport to a free space.

name: Versatile Stance
description:
**When you enter this Stance, choose one:**
- Gain **Barrier 3.** This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end.
- Your next attack deals **+3 Bonus Damage.**
- You gain **+3 Focus,** exceeding the maximum in your Focus Pool.

name: Hunter's Mark
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character performs any **Action** while you have no Marked enemy.
**Effect:** Mark the triggering character. When a Marked character is reduced to 0 HP or removed from the encounter, recover 2 **Focus.** While a character is marked, you have **Change Target.**

name: Hunter's Mark: Change Target
description: Change your Marked character to target hostile character.

name: Kip Up
description: Clear **Prone**.

name: Divine Deflection
description:
**Condition:** You are hit by a *Ranged Attack.*
**Effect:** Make a **Resistance Roll** (11). On a **4+:** You have **Damage Resistance** against the triggering attack, and that attack has: "**On Hit:** The attacker **repeats** the attack against themselves."

name: Sweeping Strikes
description: In **Versatile Stance** or **Heavy Stance**: Your first *Melee Weapon Attack* **Action** each turn has **Cleave 2**.

name: Omnislash
description:
**Flurry**
Perform a *Basic* **Move Action** as a **Free Action**. During this *Movement,* you are **Flying** and don't trigger **Reactions.** At the end of the movement, **Omnislash's Attack Roll** targets any number of characters, as long as you were adjacent to each targeted character at any point during this *Movement*.

name: Swallow Cutter
description:
**1/Round:** When your *Melee Attack's* **Attack Roll** has **net Advantage,** you may instead make that attack with no net **Advantage** or **Disadvantage.**
**If you do,** perform a *Melee Attack* **Action** that costs 1 AP or less as a **Free Action**.

name: Trick Stance
description: When you perform an *Attack* **Action** against a hostile character that's adjacent to one or more of your allies: The **Attack Roll** has **+1 Advantage.**

name: Skirmisher
description: You can move diagonally.

name: Shadow Walk
description:
Perform **Shadow Walk** only if you're not adjacent to any hostile characters, and only while adjacent to cover or a source of cover.
You have the **Hide Reaction** until the start of your next turn.

name: Shadow Walk: Hide
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character begins their turn, and you used **Shadow Walk** on your most recent turn.
**Effect:** The character makes a **Resistance Roll**. A character that fails can't target you with **Actions** this turn unless those **Actions** could target multiple characters.

name: Eviscerate
description:
Perform **Eviscerate** only against a target that is not adjacent to any of its allies.

**On Miss:** Refund **Eviscerate's Inspiration Cost** and **1/Quest** property.

**Finisher: Eviscerate** has the following properties:
- The **Attack Roll** has +1 **Advantage.**
- **On Hit:** The target is **Sundered** until the end of their next turn.

Then, **Move** or **Evade** as a **Free Action**.

name: Lightfoot
description: Your *Movement* **Actions** ignore *natural* **Difficult Terrain** and don't activate hostile *Traps*.

name: Rip
description: **On Damage**: Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Immobilized 1**.

name: Cheap Shot
description:
**Finisher - On Hit:** Target is **Dazed +1**, and the attack deals **2 Bonus Damage** for each **Condition** affecting the target.
**Finisher - On Miss:** Graze 1+[tier]

name: Cold Blood
description: Your **Refocus** is a *Combo* **Action**.

name: Dual Wield Stance
description: You have **+1 Attack** and the **Off Hand** *Passive*.

name: Dual Wield Stance: Off Hand
description: Your first *Melee Weapon Attack* **Action** each round has **On Hit:** Perform a *Basic Attack* **Action** with **+1 Advantage.** It's a **Free Action** (?) and deals half damage on a hit.

name: Impaler
description:
**Finisher - On Damage:** The total damage is also dealt to up to one hostile character of your choice that's adjacent to the target. *(No roll.)*
**Finisher - On Miss:** Graze 5.

name: Seize Opening
description:
**Condition:** An adjacent hostile character is damaged by an allied character.
**Effect** - **Focus Cost** 1: Perform a *Basic Attack* **Action** on the damaged character. If you're in **Trick Stance**, that *Attack* **Action** has **On Hit:** Inflict **Poisoned +1.**

name: Violent Delights
description: Your *Finisher* **Actions** have **Finisher - On Hit:** Recover 1 **Focus.**

name: Knife Juggler
description:
In **Trick Stance:** The first *Melee Attack* **Action** you perform during your turn has **Range** 3, deals half damage, and inflicts **Poisoned 2.**
Otherwise, you have the **Razor** *Special* **Action**.

name: Knife Juggler: Razor
description:
**Flurry**
Deals **Piercing Damage**. *(Ignores Armor and Barrier.)*

name: Preparation
description:
If you used a *Stealth* **Action* this turn or have **Concealment**: **Study** has **+3 Range.**
When you **Study** a character, your next **Attack Roll** against that character deals **+3 Bonus Damage** on a hit.

name: Called Shot
description:
**Finisher - On Hit:** Inflict **Bleeding +1, Slowed +1, or Stunned +1.** *(You choose when dealing damage.)*
**Finisher - On Miss** Graze 2.

name: Bag of Tricks
description: In **Trick Stance:** You have the **Malice** *Special* **Action.** Otherwise, the first *Weapon Attack* **Action** you perform during your turn has **On Hit:** Inflict **Poisoned +1**.

name: Bag of Tricks: Malice
description:
If you performed a *Melee Weapon* *Attack* **Action** this turn, **Malice** is a **Combo** action, **1 AP** less *(min. 1)*, and you don't suffer **Disadvantage** when using this *Ranged Attack* **Action** while a hostile character is adjacent.
**On Hit:** Inflict **Poisoned +1.**

name: Skill Steal
description:
**Condition:** A hostile non-*Elite* character within **Range 3** performs a *Spell* **Action.**
**Effect:** That character makes a **Resistance Roll** or you gain that ability for the rest of the encounter. If it deals damage, it deals 2[atk] instead of any other damage profile. **Piercing** or **Chaos Damage** are dealt as normal damage. It doesn't deal **Bonus Damage.** It has **Focus Cost: 3** and **1/Encounter.**

name: Exsanguinate
description:
**Finisher: On Hit:** The target suffers ***x*** **Piercing Chaos Damage**, and your choice of **Bleeding** +***x*** or **Poisoned** +***x***, where ***x*** is the target's current **Bleeding** or **Poisoned** value. A character can only suffer this effect **1/Encounter**.
**Finisher - On Miss:** Graze [T].

name: Ruinous Blade
description: The **Bound** *Attack* has **On Hit, Choose One:** Inflict **Poisoned +1** or **Bleeding +1.**

name: Ranged Stance
description: In **Ranged Stance,** you can perform *Ranged Weapon Attack* **Actions.** Your *Basic* **Attack Action** is *Ranged* and has **Range 4.**

name: Reactive Shot
description: Create **Reactive Shot,** a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile within **Range** of your *Basic* **Attack Action** that lasts until the start of your next turn. For that duration, you gain the **Predator** (?) *Special* **Reaction**.

name: Reactive Shot: Predator
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character moves into your **Reactive Shot.**
**Effect:** Perform a *Ranged Attack* **Action** that costs or less targeting that character.

name: Snare Trap
description:
A **Snare Trap** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent while armed.
- **Effect:** The hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Immobilized 1** and can't perform reactions while **Immobilized.** A character that **Resists** is **Slowed 1.**

name: Deadeye
description:
**For the rest of the encounter:** 
- Your *Attack* **Actions** have **Flurry.** 
- Your **Predator** *Reaction* is **1/Turn**. 
- Actions with *Range* have **+3 Range.** 
- Your *Trap* **Actions** with **1/Encounter** are **1/Round** instead.

name: Admixture
description: Your next *Ranged Weapon Attack* **Action** this turn has **On Damage:** Inflict **Bleeding 1, Poisoned 1,** or **Slowed 1.** *(You choose.)*

name: Smoke Trap
description:
A **Smoke Trap** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent while armed.
- **Effect:** The **Trap** detonates in a **Size 1 Area** centered on its tile, which lasts until the end of your next turn. Characters in that area have **Concealment 3.**

name: Steady Aim
description: This turn, your *Ranged Attack* **Actions** ignore cover.

name: First Aid
description: When you perform the *Basic* **Aid Action** on an allied character, **Focus Cost:** 2 -- That character receives **1 Healing** and removes **Bleeding, Slowed,** and **Immobilized** if those conditions weren't self-inflicted.

name: Free Shot
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within your *Basic* **Attack Action's Range** is hit by an allied character's attack.
**Effect:** Perform your *Basic* **Attack Action** on the hostile character. It deals half damage and no bonus damage.

name: Exploding Trap
description:
An **Exploding Trap** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent while armed.
- **Effect:** All characters adjacent to the **Trap** make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer the Trap's damage (half on a **Resist**).

name: Volley
description: Characters in a **Size 1 Area** centered on a tile within your *Basic* **Attack Action's Range** become targets.

name: Splintering Arrow
description: **Each round,** the first **Attack Roll** you make as part of a *Ranged Weapon Attack* **Action** has **On Damage:** Deal **3 Damage** to up to one hostile character of your choice adjacent to one target of the attack. *(No roll.)*

name: Lock On
description: **Start of Turn:** You may become **Immobilized** until the start of your next turn. While **Immobilized** this way, *Ranged Attack* **Actions** have **+1 Advantage.**

name: Zen Archer
description: When you perform the *Basic* **Refocus Action**, you can perform a *Ranged Attack* **Action** that costs **1 AP** as a **Free Action**. It deals no bonus damage.

name: Blinding Trap
description:
A **Blinding Trap** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent while armed.
- **Effect:** The hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Blinded 4** until the end of their next turn, or **Blinded 1** on a **Resist.** *(A Blinded character treats other characters as though they have Concealment equal to the Blinded amount.)*

name: Point Blank Stance
description:
You have **+1 Attack**. Your *Basic* *Attack* **Action** is *Ranged* and has **Range 3.** Your **Actions** with **Range** have a **Maximum Range** of **3.**

You don't suffer **Disadvantage** for performing ***non-Spell*** *Ranged* **Attack Actions** against adjacent targets. Your *Ranged* **Attack Actions** ignore cover.

name: Rupturing Shot
description: **On Damage:** You gain the **Rupture** reaction until the start of your next turn. The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes a **Ruptured** target for the same duration.

name: Rupturing Shot: Rupture
description:
**Condition:** Your **Ruptured** target ends its turn.
**Effect:** The triggering character suffers **Piercing Chaos** damage equal to the number of tiles it moved this turn. That character is no longer a **Ruptured** target. *(Includes involuntary movement. No roll.)*

name: Luciform Eye
description: Your *Attack* **Actions** with non-*Melee* **Range** have +2 **Range.**

name: Improved Focus
description: Increased **Focus Pool** (+2).

name: Healer
description: **Healing** you confer is increased by 1.

name: Mending
description: You or up to one adjacent friendly non-*summon* character receives [d4]+1 **Healing**.

name: Reposition
description: Switch places with an adjacent character. A hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll**, preventing the movement if they **Resist**. *(Each character is simultaneously moved into the other's space. It's involuntary movement for both characters and doesn't target either of those characters.)*

name: Cleric Stance
description: Your *Support Spell* **Actions** have **Focus Cost** -1.

name: Superior Healer
description: **Healing** you confer is increased by 1.

name: Superior Focus
description: Increased **Focus Pool** (+2).

name: Condemnation
description: The DV of **Resistance Rolls** you force is increased by 1.

name: Arcane Glyph
description:
Create an **Arcane Glyph** on your tile.
- For the rest of the encounter, when you **Refocus:** Move your **Arcane Glyph** to your tile.
- While in a tile with your **Arcane Glyph:**
- Your non-*Support* **Spells** have **-1 AP Cost** *(min. 1)*.
- *Spell* **Actions** have **Focus Cost -1** *(min. 1)*.
- **Spells** with **Range** have **Range +1**.

name: Arcane Warp
description:
**Condition:** Your turn begins.
**Effect:** **Teleport** to your **Arcane Glyph**.

name: Ultimate Calamity
description: You gain **3 Bonus AP**. This **Bonus AP** is lost when you perform any non-*Spell* **Action**. This turn, *Spell* **Actions** you perform with **1 or more Bonus AP** cost **0 Focus**. Additionally, this turn, your **Ranged Attacks** gain **Flurry** and treat **Obstructions** as **Cover** as long as any unobstructed path of any distance exists through which they could reach the target.

name: Reliable Blast
description:
Your *Ranged Spell Attack* **Actions** with **Focus Costs** and without **Graze** have **On Miss: Graze x**, where x is the **Focus Cost**.
*(Graze can activate **On Damage** effects, but not **On Hit** effects.)*

name: Focused Blast
description: When you **Refocus**, receive **1 Healing** and the first *Spell Attack* **Action** you perform during your next turn has **+1 Advantage**. *(Does not stack.)*

name: Concentrated Power
description: During your **Delayed Turn:** Your first **Attack Action** has **+1 Advantage**.

name: Spellburst
description: Characters in a **Size 1 Area** centered on the target tile make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer **[mag] Damage**, taking **half damage** on a **Resist**.

name: Overload
description: After you perform a *Spell* **Action:** Spend up to **6 Focus**. **Overload** deals that much **Chaos Damage** to each character dealt damage by that *Spell* **Action**. This damage is halved against a target that was dealt half damage by the **Spell**.

name: Exploding Spells
description: Your *Spell Attack* **Actions** have **On Hit:** Characters adjacent to the target take **[tier]+1 Damage**. This benefit applies only once per **Action**. *(No roll.)*

name: Concussive Blast
description:
**Bind to a *Spell Attack* Action.** *(When you begin an encounter, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to.)*
The **Bound Attack** has **On Hit: Push 1**.

name: Destroyer Stance
description: You have **Magic +2.**

name: Incandescent Ray
description: Hostile characters in the **Line** make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer **2d6+3 Damage**, taking **half damage** on a **Resist**.

name: Perfected Fuels
description:
Your *Spell* **Actions** deal **+2 Bonus Damage** while above half of your maximum **Focus Pool**.
If you would pay a **Focus Cost**, you may instead pay **1 + x HP**, where x is that **Focus Cost**. *(This is a cost, not damage: it can't be prevented and must be paid to perform the Action.)*

name: Uncontrollable Power
description:
**Bind to an Attack Action.** *(When you begin an encounter, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to.)*
The **Bound Attack** has **+1 Disadvantage** and deals **+1d6 Bonus Damage**.

name: Destruction
description:
"**Destruction** deals maximum damage to destructibles and treats **Obstructions** as **Cover** as long as any unobstructed path to the target exists.


**During your Delayed Turn:** **Destruction** deals **6 Bonus Damage** and has **+1 Advantage**."

name: Eye of Oblivion
description: When you roll the highest possible number on any die when determining the damage of an **Action:** Roll one of those dice again. The **Action** deals that much **Bonus Damage**.

name: Paradox
description:
You have the **Conservation Law** *Special* **Passive** and the **Paradox** *Special* **Action**.

**Conservation Law â€” Special Passive**
Each round, the first non-*Paradox* *Spell* **Action** you perform that deals damage has the following properties:
- The damage the **Spell** deals to each character is reduced by **5**. It deals no **Bonus Damage**.
- **On Damage:** At the beginning of the next round, **Charge Paradox**.
- At the end of any round, if **Paradox** is **Charged:** **Discharge Paradox**.

name: Paradox: Discharge
description:
*(Perform this Action only while it's Charged.)*
- **Flurry.**
- **On Attack, Discharge Paradox:** Recover **5 Focus**.

name: Calamity
description: Each round, your first hit with a *Spell Attack* **Action** deals **+2 Bonus Damage** to one target.

name: Bolt
description: **Flurry**

name: Concussive Rune
description:
A **Concussive Rune** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent.
- **Effect:** Characters in a **Size 1 Area** centered on the *Trap* make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer d4+2 **Damage** and **Dazed+1**. A character that resists suffers half damage and isn't **Dazed**.

You can have no more than one **Concussive Trap** in play at a time. Remove the previous one from the map if a new one is created.

name: Evoker Stance
description: Your *Attack Spell* **Actions** have **Focus Cost -1**.

name: Addle
description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers [mag] **damage** and is **Slowed 1** and **Dazed +1**. A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't **Dazed** or **Slowed**.

name: Blink
description: Teleport to target free space.

name: Supreme Calamity
description: Each round, your first hit with a *Spell Attack* **Action** deals **+2 Bonus Damage** to one target.

name: Signature Spell
description:
**Bind** to a *Spell* **Action**.
The **Bound** *Spell* has **Focus Cost -1** *(min. 0)*.

name: Precision
description:
**Bind** to an *Attack* **Action**.
The **Bound Action** has **+1 Advantage**.

name: Signature Move
description:
**Bind** to an **Action or Reaction** with a **Focus Cost**.
The **Bound Action** or **Reaction** has **Focus Cost -1** *(min. 1)*.

name: Skirmisher
description: You can move diagonally.

name: Prototrophize
description: **1/Encounter:** When you **Refocus**, increase the **Flow of Battle** by 1.

name: Diehard
description: If you would be **Downed**, **1/Encounter:** Make a **Resistance Roll** (10). On a success, you remain at 1 HP.

name: Supreme Resolve
description: The *Basic* **Refocus Action** restores 1/2 of your maximum **Focus** instead of 1/3.

name: Ranged Stance
description: In **Ranged Stance,** you can perform *Ranged Weapon Attack* **Actions.** Your *Basic* **Attack Action** is *Ranged* and has **Range 4.**

name: Swiftcast
description:
**Condition:** Another character's turn ends.

**Effect:** Spend 1 **Inspiration**. Perform a *Spell* **Action** with a **Base AP Cost** of **2 AP** or less as part of this **Reaction**. You still pay all other costs of that **Action**.

name: Demolitionist
description:
When you perform a *Trap* **Action,** you may pay 1 AP. If you do, that *Trap* becomes armed immediately, and you can activate it as a free **Reaction** at the end of any character's turn. *(Traps activated this way aren't considered to be triggered by any character.)

You may perform *Trap* **Actions** as though they had **Spend 1 Inspiration** instead of **1/Encounter.**

name: Snipe
description:
Perform **Snipe** only during your turn, only with **Initiative**, and only while you have **Concealment**.
- **Flurry**. 
- **+1 Advantage**.
- **On Critical:** The target is **Stunned +2**.

name: Trueshot Aura
description: Allied characters within your *Aura* have **+1 Advantage** with *Ranged* **Attack Actions.**

name: Arcane Archer
description:
While you aren't in a *Ranged Weapon Stance*: You can perform *Ranged Weapon* **Actions** in any *Stance*.
If the **Focus Cost** of those **Actions** is lower than the **AP Cost** of those **Actions**, the **Focus Cost** becomes the **AP Cost**.
Any [atk] in the damage profile of those **Actions** becomes [mag].

name: Animal Companion
description:
Conjure an **Animal Companion** in an adjacent free tile. *( You choose its name and appearance.  )*

Your Animal Companion is **Legendary**. It can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack, and Evade** using your **AP**. It gains **1 Turn AP** of its own at the start of your turn. It can perform all *Melee* **Actions** available to you using your Focus Pool.

**Animal Companion** (**ATK** d6, **MAG** d6, **HP** 1/2 Yours, **DEF** 9, **SPD** 4, **FP** 0, **Armor** 2) **1/Round**: When a hostile character triggers a *Trap*, your **Animal Companion** can perform a *Basic* **Move** or **Attack Action** as a **Free Reaction**.

name: Unstoppable Force
description:
- Ignore **Disadvantage** when performing **Shield Charge** and **Shield Slam.**

- When you **Shield Charge, Spend 1 Inspiration:** You can move up to three times as far and change directions during this movement.

- When you **Shield Slam, Spend 1 Inspiration:** The target is knocked **Prone**, even on a miss or **Resist.**

name: Oath Magic
description: While in a *Shield Stance:* Your **Magic Bonus** is increased by **1** and you have *Support Spell* **Focus Cost -1** *(min. 1)*.

name: Pavise Mastery
description: - When an attack against an allied character benefits from cover provided by your **Pavise:** The allied character gains **Damage Resistance** to that attack, and as a **Reaction:** You can **Spend 1 Inspiration** and that character becomes **Blessed**.

name: Oathsworn Shield
description:
**On Hit:** **Spend 1 Inspiration:** You may repeat **Oathsworn Shield** as a **Free Action** against a different character, with **Range** originating from the previous target. It has **Flurry,** costs **0 Focus,** and deals no **Bonus Damage.** You may pay this **Inspiration** cost any number of times or until you target the same character an additional time.

**On Damage:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone.**

name: Dilletante: Paladin
description: You gain the **Guardian's Stance** and **Raise Shield Basic Abilities.**

name: Maneuver Specialist
description:
- You have the **Grapple** and **Shove Abilities** from the **Deck of Towers Generic Abilities.**
- **1/Encounter, when a hostile character makes a Resistance Roll against your Grapple or Shove, Spend 1 Inspiration**: That character automatically fails.

name: Heroic Leap
description:
- When you perform **Battle Charge,** you **Teleport** instead of moving.
- **At the end of this movement, Spend 1 Inspiration:** Adjacent hostile characters make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer 2[atk] **damage** and are **Immobilized 1.** A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't **Immobilized.**

name: Master at Arms
description: **Start of Encounter:** You choose two *Stances* from those available to you instead of one. You gain all benefits of both.

name: Combat Reflexes
description:
- Your **Attack of Opportunity** is **2/Round** and gains the following additional **Condition:**
- **Condition:** A hostile character becomes adjacent to you during a voluntary *Movement.* *( Movement continues after your attack. )*

name: Dilletante: Warrior
description: You gain **Rearm** and a *Stance* of your choice from the **Warrior's Basic Abilities.**

name: Shadowbreaker
description:
Perform **Shadowbreaker** only during a **Delayed Turn.**

- Hostile characters in the **Line** make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer **Shadowbreaker's** damage and are moved 1 tile to either side of the **Line**. *(You choose which side, if applicable.)*
- A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't moved.

name: Inviolate Spite
description: When a hostile character within **Range 12** clears **Taunted, Spend 1 Inspiration**: Taunt that character.

name: Burning Hatred
description:
Your **Hatred** is improved and has the following additional property:
- **Start of Turn:** Deal [tier]+1 **Piercing Damage** to hostile characters within **Hatred.** Those characters make a **Resistance Roll** or are **Taunted.**

name: Crisis Infinity
description: **While Battered** - **Start of Turn: Gain 1 AP**. Spend this **AP** only on *Basic* **Actions.**

name: Dilettante: Avenger
description: You gain the **Taunt** and **Shadowbringer** abilities.

name: Sword Summoner
description:
**1/Round:** When you deal damage to one or more targets with a *Melee Attack* **Action**, you gain a **Blade Die**. *(It's a d6. You have a maximum of three.)*
- When a hostile character adjacent to you begins a turn, that character takes **Piercing Damage** equal to your number of **Blade Dice**. *(Ignores Armor and Barrier.)*
- When a hostile character within **Range 3** deals damage to you, as a **Free Reaction:** Roll and expend up to two **Blade Dice**. You may choose up to one result, and reduce the damage by that much. You may choose up to one result, and deal that much damage to the triggering character.

name: Storm Approaching
description: Your *Attack* **Actions** have **Flurry.**

name: Judgment Cut
description:
Perform **Judgment Cut** only if your most recent **Action** was a non-**Judgment Cut** *Melee Weapon Attack* **Action** that hit one or more hostile characters.

**Flurry**

name: Endless Motivation
description:
**Start of Turn:** Recover 2 **Focus**.

- When you complete a voluntary *Movement,* if you moved away from the most recent hostile character you dealt damage to, lose all **Focus.** *(You moved away from that character If you ended your Movement further away from that character than you began it.)*

name: Profuse Bleeding
description:
**Savage Blade** confers **+1 Advantage** to the attack.

If your action would inflict **Bleeding** ***x*** to one or more characters, you may **Spend 1 Inspiration**. If you do, increase that amount by one and you inflict **Bleeding** ***+x*** instead.

name: Daredevil
description: Your *non-Finisher* *Attack* **Actions** are *Combo* **Actions** during turns in which you've flown 4 or more spaces. You have the *Special* **Acrobat Action.**

name: Daredevil: Acrobat
description:
You can **Spend 1 Inspiration** rather than pay **Daredevil's AP Cost**.

While moving this turn, you are **Flying**. You can’t change directions while **Flying** this way.

name: Invisible Blade
description:
*Attack* **Actions** you perform while you have **Concealment** have **+1 Advantage.**
When you perform a *Stealth* **Action**, you may **Spend 1 Inspiration**. If you do, you gain Concealment 3 until the end of your next turn.

name: Elegant Finisher
description:
Bind to a non-*Combo* *Attack* **Action**.
The Bound *Attack* is a **Finisher** and has the following property:
- Finisher, On Hit: Gain **1 AP**.

name: Elusive
description: Your *Basic* **Evade** is **Move 2** and a *Combo* **Action**.

name: Dilletante: Scoundrel
description: You gain the **Trick Stance** and **Shadow Walk** abilities.

name: Apocalypse
description: **1/Encounter,** when you perform a *Spell Attack* **Action:** You may **Spend 1 Inspiration**. If you do, any damage dealt by that *Spell* is **Chaos Damage.**

name: Meteor
description: **1/Quest, Spend 1 Inspiration:** Characters in a **Size 2 Area** centered on target tile make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer damage and become **Prone.** A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't **Prone.** The **Area** is **Difficult Terrain** for the rest of the encounter.

name: Manaward
description:
**Condition:** You suffer any amount of damage from a single source.

**Effect:** Prevent that damage. You are **Immobilized 1**.

name: Enochian
description:
**Beginning of Encounter:** Create an **Astral Die** and **Umbral Die.** *(They're d6s with values that begin at "1".)*

**When your** *Spell* **Action** confers **Healing** or **Barrier** to one or more characters, **choose one or both:**
- Reduce your **Astral Star**'s value to "1" and increase that **Healing** or **Barrier** by **twice the difference.**
- Increase your **Umbral Star's** value by 1.

**When your** *Spell* **Action** deals damage to one or more characters, **choose one or both:**
- Reduce your **Umbral Star's** value to "1" and recover **Focus** equal to **one plus the difference.**
- Increase your **Astral Star's** value by 1.

name: Dilletante: Arcanimist
description: You gain the **Arcane Glyph** and **Arcane Warp** **Basic Abilities.**

name: Sign
description: You don't suffer **Disadvantage** when using a *Ranged Spell Attack* **Action** while a hostile character is adjacent.

name: Combined Offensive
description:
You may perform **Combined Offensive** with **1, 2, or 3 AP**. When you perform **Combined Offensive**, choose *Weapon* or *Spell.* Then, perform a corresponding *Attack* **Action** with an **AP Cost** less than or equal to the amount used to perform **Combined Offensive.**

**Then,** perform a *Weapon* **Action** (if you chose *Spell*) or *Spell* **Action** (if you chose *Weapon*) *that* costs **1 AP** as a **Free Action**. You pay all other costs for this **Action.** If this **Action** is also an *Attack*, it must target the same character as the previous **Action.**

name: Tactician's Stance
description: *Support Spell* **Focus Cost -1.**

name: Grand Strategy
description:
Hostile characters in a **Size 3 Area** centered on you become **Off Guard.** **For the rest of the encounter, you have the following properties:**

- When performing an **Action** reduces you to 0 **Focus,** recover 2 **Focus.**

- Whenever you perform a *Spell* **Action** or the *Basic* **Study Action**, you or an allied character of your choice within **Range** 12 can perform a *Basic* **Evade Action** as a **Free Reaction**.

- **Start of Turn:** You may perform the *Basic* **Study Action** as a **Free Action**.

name: Counterspell
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within **Range 6** performs a *Spell* **Action.**

**Effect:** Prevent that action. You gain [tier] **Focus.** *(The action is treated as if it had no effects. Costs are still paid. If the action was a charged ability, it's no longer charged.)*

name: Magic Shield
description: You have a **Block Rating** equal to [tier]+4. Your *Shield* **Actions** are *Spell* **Actions**, using the higher value between [atk] and [mag] where applicable. You can perform *Shield* **Actions** in any **Stance.** Whenever you perform a *Shield* **Action,** you gain the **Ward Reaction** until the start of your next turn.

name: Magic Shield: Ward
description:
**Condition**: You are targeted by an *Attack* that would deal 1 or more damage.

**Effect - Focus Cost 1:** Gain **Barrier** equal to your **Block Rating.** If you have no **Barrier** remaining after damage is dealt, you are **Stunned +1.**

name: War Caster
description: If you would perform an *Attack* **Action** as a **Reaction,** you may perform a *Spell* **Action** that could target the triggering character instead, and you may **Spend 1 Inspiration** rather than paying the **Focus Cost** for this *Spell* **Action.**

name: Contingency
description: **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Choose an available *Spell* **Action.** You pay its **Focus Cost** and its **AP Cost** reduced by **1 AP** *(min. 1).* Create a **Glyph of Warding**, a *Trap* which stores that spell, in a free tile within **Range 6**. Starting at the beginning of your next turn, you have the **Activate Contingency** Reaction while the Glyph exists.

name: Contingency: Activate
description:
**Condition:** An eligible target of the chosen spell moves onto or becomes adjacent to your **Glyph** or begins their turn on or adjacent to your **Glyph.**

**Effect:** The triggering character triggers your **Glyph.** Destroy the **Glyph** and perform that *Spell* **Action** on the triggering character as a **Reaction** with no **Focus** cost. If it has a range profile, the range profile is drawn from the **Glyph's** tile.

name: Simulation
description:
When you **Study** a hostile character, you may roll an **Action Resolution.** **For that character**, the result of that **Action Resolution** is stored until you perform an **Attack Roll** against that character or make a **Resistance Roll** against one of that character's **Actions** or effects.

**When you do:** Instead of performing an **Action Resolution,** use the stored value.

name: Disciplined Tactician
description:
Increased **Focus Pool** (+1).

When you **Refocus**, you may **Study** as a **Free Action**.

name: Rune Edge
description:
All characters in the **Cleave** become targets.

As you perform **Rune Edge**, you choose if it's a *Weapon* or *Spell* **Action**, both, or neither.

name: Spell Pierce
description: During your turn, the first *Spell Attack* **Action** you perform has **+1 Advantage**.

name: Embolden
description:
You perform the *Basic* **Aid Action** on an allied character within **Range 5.** You can always choose to give that character **Advantage** when performing **Aid** this way, though you still have to make an **Action Resolution.**

That character also receives **1 Healing.**

name: Shock
description:
**Flurry**

**On Hit:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Stunned +1.**

name: Imperial Eye
description: When you **Study** a hostile character, the next *Attack* targeting that character has **On Hit:** [tier]+1 **Bonus Damage.**

name: Absorb
description: You or up to one allied character within **Range** gains **Barrier** [mag]. This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end.

name: Celerity
description:
You or up to one adjacent allied character gain **Haste:** At the beginning of your turn, gain **1 AP**.

**Haste** lasts until the end of the encounter, or until the affected character ends a turn with no AP remaining. *(It's a special Status.)*

name: Divine Eye
description: **1/Round**: When you **Study** a hostile character, that character becomes **Off Guard.**

name: Mind Palace
description: **At the end of your turn:** If you performed the *Basic* **Study Action** and dealt no damage to hostile characters, **recover 2 Focus.**

name: Freedom of Movement
description:
You or an adjacent allied character gains **Freedom of Movement** until the end of your next turn. The character ignores **Difficult Terrain** and is immune to **Slowed, Stunned,** and **Immobilized.**

**Sustain** - **Focus Cost: 1** *( Each active instance must be Sustained separately. Freedom of Movement is a special Status. )*

name: Nova
description: All characters in **Range** become targets.

name: Might and Magic
description:
When you perform a *Weapon Attack* **Action,** your next *Spell Attack* **Action** has **+1 Advantage** and deals **+2 Bonus Damage.** *( Does not stack. )*

When you perform a *Spell Attack* **Action,** your next *Weapon Attack* **Action** has **+1 Advantage** and deals **+2 Bonus Damage.** *( Does not stack. )*

name: Visual Calculus
description:
Create **Visual Calculus.** It's a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile.

**For the rest of the encounter:** Hostile characters in the area are **Sundered** and can't perform *Stealth* **Actions** or benefit from **Concealment.**

You have **1 AP:** Move **Visual Calculus** to target tile within **Range** 5.

name: Elemental Shift
description:
**Start of Encounter:** Choose a terrain type to associate with your **Elemental Shift.**
- **Fire** â€” A character that ends their turn in Fire suffers 1d6 Piercing Damage.
- **Water** â€” Water is **Difficult Terrain.**
- **Air** â€” Characters in the area have **Concealment 2.**

When you perform the *Basic* **Refocus Action,** you may choose a different terrain type.

name: Terrain Transmutation
description: Choose a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile. For the rest of the encounter or until you perform this **Action** again, that area becomes the terrain type associated with your **Elemental Shift.**

name: Stable
description: Your movement ignores **Difficult Terrain.**

name: Ultimate: Alchemical Eruption
description:
Choose three **Size 1 Areas** or one **Size 2 Area** centered on tiles within **Range 12.** The areas can't overlap. Each chosen area becomes a terrain type of your choice from among those available to your **Elemental Shift.**

For the rest of the encounter, as you perform **Terrain Transmutation,** you may change the type associated with your **Elemental Shift.** Additionally, your **Elemental Shift** has access to the following special terrain types:

- **Orichalcum:** A character that begins a turn in Orichalcum gains **1 AP.**
- **Acid:** A character in Acid is **Sundered.**
- **Ice:** A character that enters the terrain from any direction during a non-Teleport Movement ends that Movement, loses all remaining Movement from that action or effect, then suffers involuntary movement in that direction until they are no longer on an Ice tile or they collide. This involuntary movement doesn't trigger Traps or other abilities.

name: Cloudkill
description:
The **Area** created by **Rolling Amber** is **Difficult Terrain** and its edge blocks **Line of Effect.** *(Range can't be drawn through it, into it from outside, or outside of it from inside.)*

When you perform **Rolling Amber, Spend 1 Inspiration:** Characters in the area make an additional **Resistance Roll** against the **Action's** effect immediately. *(As if they'd just begun their turns.)*

name: Adept of Motion
description: If you would **Push** or **Pull** a character, instead, you move that character that far in any direction.  You have **Teleport Ally**.

name: Adept of Motion: Teleport Ally
description: **1/Encounter â€” Spend 1 Inspiration:** Teleport yourself or an allied character within **Range** to a target free tile within **Range.**

name: Spikes
description: When a character becomes affected by **Difficult Terrain** you created: That character suffers **3 Piercing Damage.** A character can only take this damage **1/Round.** *(No roll. A character becomes affected by Difficult Terrain when it causes them to spend additional movement.)*

name: Master Controller
description: During each of your turns, the first *Spell* **Action** you perform that targets a tile or space has **AP Cost -1** *(min. 1)*.

name: Master of Boundaries
description: **Create Wall** targets a fourth tile. Objects you create have **+2 HP.** You have **Master of Boundaries: Create**.

name: Master of Boundaries: Create
description: **1/Encounter:** Create a **Wall** in a target free tile within **Range.** It's a **Destructible Obstruction** with [tier]+8 HP and **Elevation 3.**

name: Mold Earth
description:
Choose one:
- For the rest of the encounter, target free tile becomes **Difficult Terrain.**
- For the rest of the encounter, target tile that's **Difficult Terrain** becomes normal terrain.

name: Explosive Runes
description: When a hostile character triggers your **Trap:** That character suffers **3 Damage.** *(No roll.)*

name: Outmaneuver
description: Each turn, your first **Attack Action** has **+1 Advantage** against targets in **Difficult Terrain.**

name: Elemental Seal
description:
Perform **Elemental Seal** only while you have fewer than [tier]+1 **Elemental Seals** in play.

An **Elemental Seal** is armed at the start of your next turn and activates when a hostile character becomes adjacent while armed.

**Effect:** The **Trap** detonates in a **Size 1 Area.** Characters in that area make a **Resistance Roll,** suffering **2[mag] Damage** and becoming **Slowed 1.** A character that **Resists** suffers half damage and isn't slowed.

name: Elemental Sparks
description:
**Flurry** â€” Target up to three characters. *(Make a separate Attack Roll for each.)*

**On Damage:** The target character suffers **Push 1.**

name: Levitate
description: You or an adjacent allied character is **Flying** during voluntary Movement until the end of that character's next turn.

name: Kinesis
description:
Target hostile character in **Range** makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and becomes **Prone.**

**Resist:** **Push 1.**

A **Prone** character always **Resists Kinesis.**

name: Phantom Tether
description:
**Flurry**

**On Hit:** Until the start of your next turn, if the target performs a **Movement Action** and moves closer to you, that character suffers **[mag]+4 Damage.** *(No roll.)*

name: Create Wall
description: Target three free contiguous tiles, where each tile shares an edge with the previous tile. Create **Walls,** **Destructible Obstructions** with [tier]+8 HP in those tiles. Tiles obstructed this way have **Elevation 3.**

name: Gravity Well
description:
Characters in a **Size 2 Area** centered on the target tile make a **Resistance Roll.**

A character that fails the **Resistance Roll** is **Teleported** as close to the center of the area as possible. *(You choose the order in which characters are moved.)*

name: Sacred Geometry
description: At the end of your turn, if you are adjacent to exactly two obstructed tiles: **Recover 2 Focus.**

name: Rolling Amber
description:
Create **Rolling Amber,** a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile. It lasts until the end of your next turn.

When a character begins their turn in the area or moves into the area for the first time during their turn: That character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **1d6+[tier] Damage,** or half on a **Resist.** If the character triggered this effect by moving into the area, that movement ends and remaining movement from that effect is lost.

**(1ap) Sustain â€” Focus Cost: 1:** You may move the area one tile in any direction.

name: Erupting Earth
description: For the rest of the encounter: You have the **Stalagmite** Reaction.

name: Erupting Earth: Stalagmite
description:
**2/Encounter â€” Condition:** A hostile character attempts to move into a free tile within **Range 2.**

**Effect:** Create a **Wall,** a **Destructible Obstruction** with [tier]+8 HP in that tile. A tile obstructed this way has **Elevation 3.** The triggering movement is prevented, and any movement remaining from that effect is lost.

name: Reflecting Pool
description:
Create a **Reflecting Pool,** a **Size 1 Area** centered on target tile. It lasts for the rest of the encounter.

While in a **Reflecting Pool,** allied characters have:

**(1 AP) - 1/Round:** Perform the last non-Ultimate, non-Summon, non-Reflecting Pool **Action** you performed. It's a **Free Action (0ap)** with **Focus Cost 0** that deals half damage, deals no bonus damage, and can't generate AP or reduce AP Costs. It has **Flurry** if it's an **Attack** and is considered to be charged if it's a **Charged** ability. Any **Inspiration Cost** must still be paid. Usage limits are ignored. *(Such as x/turn, x/round, or x/encounter.)*

name: Crystal of Light
description:
Conjure a **Crystal of Light** in an adjacent empty tile. A **Crystal of Light** can **Move** using your AP. The **Crystal of Light** Teleports when making voluntary movement.

Damage dealt to a **Crystal of Light** is reduced to 1 and dealt as Piercing Chaos Damage. A **Crystal of Light** can't be Healed.

**ATK:** 0 | **MAG:** 0 | **HP:** [tier]+3 | **DEF:** 8 | **SPD:** 4 | **FP:** 0

A **Crystal of Light** is **Legendary.** While adjacent to a **Crystal of Light,** you and allied characters have the **Refraction** Reaction. *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

name: Crystal of Light: Refraction
description:
**1/Turn â€” Condition:** You become the target of a **Ranged Action** that targets only one character.

**Effect:** Change the target of that **Action** to a character of your choice within **Range 4** of the **Crystal of Light.** The **Crystal of Light** takes **1 Piercing Chaos Damage.**

name: Dimensional Bolt
description:
**Flurry**

**On Hit:** Until the start of your next turn, if your **Summon** would deal damage to the target, it deals [tier] **Bonus Damage.**

name: The Art
description:
You may perform **The Art** with **1, 2, or 3 AP.** When you perform **The Art**, perform any available **Action** that costs **AP** less than or equal to the amount used to perform **The Art.**

Then, one **Summon** you control performs an available **Action** that costs **1 AP** as a **Free Action.**

name: Reposition Summon
description: While moving, if you would **Collide** with your **Summon** or enter its tile from an adjacent tile, you may instead switch places with it.

name: Ultimate: The Communion
description: For the rest of the encounter: You may perform **Attack** and **Spell Actions** as though you were in the same tile as any **Summon** you control. Additionally, you have **Death Erasure.**

name: Death Erasure
description:
**1/Round â€” Condition:** You or an allied character within **Range 5** would fail a **Resistance Roll,** take any amount of damage, or die.

**Effect:** Sacrifice a **Summon.** If you do, ignore the effect that triggered **Death Erasure** and reduce any incoming damage to 0.

name: Master Summoner
description:
You can control two **Legendary Summons,** as long as you control no other **Summons** and they aren't two of the same **Legendary Summon.**

Your **Summons** can move diagonally. The first time you **Conjure** a **Legendary Summon** each encounter, if it's your turn, gain **(1ap).**

**1/Quest:** When you **Conjure** a **Legendary Summon, Spend 1 Inspiration:** That **Legendary Summon** gains **Focus Pool 6** (max. 6), has all non-Summon, non-Basic **Spell Actions** available to you, and can perform them using your AP. It also has **Start of Turn:** Recover 1 Focus.

name: The Abyss
description: When your **Summon** dies, adjacent characters make a **Resistance Roll.** On a failure, those characters take **2[mag] Damage.** A character that **Resists** takes half as much damage.

name: The Abyss: Seethe
description: **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Characters adjacent to one or more of your **Summons** make a **Resistance Roll** or take **2[mag] Damage.** A character that **Resists** takes half as much damage.

name: The Ritual
description: **1/Round,** when you **Sacrifice** a **Summon** during your turn, **Spend 1 Inspiration:** Gain **1 AP.**

name: The Ritual: Sacrifice Summon
description: **Sacrifice** a **Summon:** Gain **2 Focus.** *(You can't exceed the maximum in your Focus Pool.)*

name: The Hourglass
description:
Increases **Focus Pool.** (+1)

You gain an additional **Reaction** during each other character's turn. Use this **Reaction** only to perform a *Spell* Reaction.

name: Dilettante: Occultist
description: You gain the **Basic Ability** "The Art." *(You can never gain two abilities with the same name.)*

name: Conjure Blockade
description:
Conjure a **Blockade** in an adjacent empty tile. A **Blockade** has no Basic Actions. It can be used as cover, and is considered a destructible object only for the purposes of providing cover.

The **Blockade** has **Armor** equal to 3 plus your Tier.

**ATK:** 0 | **MAG:** 0 | **HP:** [tier]+6 | **Armor:** 3 | **DEF:** 11 | **SPD:** 0 | **FP:** 0

name: Conjure Legion
description:
Conjure a **Legion** in an adjacent empty tile. A **Legion** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP.

**ATK:** Yours | **MAG:** Yours | **HP:** [tier]+4 | **Armor:** 0 | **DEF:** 11 | **SPD:** 4 | **FP:** 0

name: The Talisman
description:
**1/Turn â€” Condition:** An allied character adjacent to your **Summon** makes an **Attack Roll** or **Resistance Roll.**

**Effect:** The allied character gains **+1 Advantage** on the **Attack Roll** or **Resistance Roll.**

name: Summon Attack of Opportunity
description:
**1/Turn â€” Condition:** A hostile character within the **Range** of a **Melee Attack** action available to your **Summon** performs a **Movement Action.**

**Effect:** Your **Summon** uses that **Melee Attack Action** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action.** Each **Summon** can attack this way no more than **1/Round.**

name: Fortified Conjurations
description: Your **Summons** have **Max HP: +4.**

name: Conjure Dantalion
description:
Conjure **Dantalion** in an adjacent empty tile. **Dantalion** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP.

**ATK:** Yours | **MAG:** 1d8 | **HP:** [tier]+4 | **Armor:** 0 | **DEF:** 10 | **SPD:** 3 | **FP:** 0

**Dantalion** is **Legendary** and has the **Tome** Reaction, which uses your Reaction. *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

name: Dantalion: The Tome
description:
**1/Round â€” Condition:** An allied character other than the summoner attacks a hostile target within **Range 6** of **Dantalion** during their turn.

**Effect:** *Ranged Spell Attack* â€” **Range:** 6 | **DMG:** [mag]+[tier]

This attack targets the hostile target. It treats obstructions as cover as long as any unobstructed path to the target exists.

name: Conjure Paimon
description:
Conjure **Paimon** in an adjacent empty tile. **Paimon** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP.

- **Paimon** is **Flying** and deals all damage as **Chaos Damage.**
- **Paimon's** movement doesn't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

**ATK:** 1 | **MAG:** 1 | **HP:** [tier]+5 | **DEF:** 10 | **SPD:** 3 | **FP:** 0

**Paimon** is **Legendary** and has the **Cure** Reaction, which uses your Reaction. *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

name: Paimon: The Cure
description:
**Condition:** An allied character moves adjacent to or begins their turn adjacent to **Paimon.**

**Effect:** **Paimon** suffers **2 Chaos Damage.** The allied character clears up to one non-self-inflicted **Condition** and may become **Blessed** or gain **Barrier 2.** *(Their choice.)* This **Barrier** isn't lost as turns end.

name: The Concept
description: Recover one third of your maximum **Focus.**

name: The Boundary
description: **Beginning of Encounter:** Perform a *Summon Spell* **Action** as a **Free Reaction** before any character takes a turn. *(You still pay its costs.)*

name: The Curse
description: **On Attack:** At the beginning of your next turn â€” up to one **Summon** you control performs **The Curse** as a **Free Action (0ap)** with no **Focus Cost.**

name: The Pattern
description: Each **Summon** you control may perform a *Basic* **Action** that costs **1 AP** or less as a **Free Action.**

name: The Answer
description:
**Condition:** An allied character becomes the target of a hostile **Action.**

**Effect:** Switch the location of that allied character with your **Summon** within **Range 12** of that allied character. *(Each character Teleports to the other's location.)*

Your **Summon** becomes the new target of the hostile **Action.**

name: The Hunger
description:
**Sacrifice** a **Summon:** Allied characters adjacent to that **Summon** receive **Healing.** The total **Healing** is equal to the sacrificed **Summon's** remaining HP, divided as you choose among those characters.

**The Hunger** doesn't benefit from bonuses to your **Healing.**

name: The Plague
description:
**Condition:** A hostile character within **Range 8** is reduced to 0 HP.

**Effect â€” Focus Cost 2:** Summon a **Legion** *(as though you'd performed Conjure Legion)* in a tile adjacent to that character.

name: The Nightmare
description:
You can **Sacrifice 3 Summons** rather than pay this **Action's Focus Cost.**

Target a free tile. Characters in a **Size 1 Area** centered on that tile make a **Resistance Roll** or suffer [mag] Damage and are **Stunned +1.** Characters that **Resist** suffer half damage and aren't **Stunned.** The target tile is **Obstructed** until the end of the round.

At the end of the round, conjure **Nightmare** in that tile. **Nightmare** can perform *Basic* **Move, Attack,** and **Evade** using your AP. **Nightmare** can always perform all **Melee Actions** available to you, and has the **Pummel** and **The End** *Special* **Actions**. It uses your **Focus.** **Nightmare** is immune to involuntary movement.

**ATK:** 5 | **MAG:** 5 | **HP:** [tier]+10 | **Armor:** 2 | **DEF:** 10 | **SPD:** 2 | **FP:** 0

**Nightmare** is **Legendary.** *(You can't control more than one Legendary Summon.)*

name: Nightmare: Pummel
description: **Nightmare's** first **Melee Attack Action** each turn has **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers **Push 2** and **Dazed +1.** The character suffers **Push 1** on a **Resist.**

name: Nightmare: The End
description:
Perform **The End** only during your **Delayed Turn** and only with **Initiative.** *(Your first AP during that turn must be spent on The End.)*

**+1 Advantage.**

name: Certain Doom
description:
**1/Round:** Deal **[tier]+1 Piercing Chaos Damage** to up to one hostile character within **Range.**

This damage can't be prevented or resisted. It doesn't target the chosen character and ignores the effects of all abilities, statuses, and conditions. **Certain Doom** doesn't trigger **Reactions** and can never deal bonus damage or increased damage.

name: Oracle's Path
description:
**Beginning of Encounter:** Declare yourself or an allied character.

This encounter, when the declared character is the first allied character to be damaged by a hostile character: That character receives **1 Healing.** You gain **3 Focus** and begin your next turn with **+1 Turn AP.** Focus gained this way can exceed your maximum and is lost at the end of the encounter.

name: Skirmisher
description: You can move diagonally.

name: Ultimate: Omniscience
description: For the rest of the encounter: You have **Adjudicate.**

name: Adjudicate
description:
**1/Round â€” Condition:** An **Action Resolution** is rolled and a result is determined.

**Effect:** Change one of the **Action Resolution** dice to a **1** or **6,** possibly changing the outcome of the **Action Resolution.**

**Adjudicate** is a **Free Reaction.** Additionally, you can't be prevented from taking this **Reaction,** except for by its own **1/Round** limit. *(For example, you can use it while under the effects of harmful Conditions that prevent the use of Reactions. You can use it if you've already performed other Reactions this turn. You can use it while staggered, downed, unconscious, dead, unable to perform actions, or if you are somehow no longer present in the scene.)*

name: Time Manipulation
description: **1/Encounter â€” Spend 1 Inspiration:** Your next **Action** has **-1 AP Cost** *(min. 0).*

name: Haruspex
description: You have the **Haruspicy** Action.

name: Haruspex: Haruspicy
description: While adjacent to a hostile character with **0 HP:** Pay half your maximum HP as an additional cost. If you do, remove that character from play and increase the **Flow of Battle** by 1.

name: Limitless Willpower
description: If you would pay a **Focus** cost, you may instead **Spend 1 Inspiration.**

name: Foresight
description: **1/Quest, Spend 1 Inspiration:** For the rest of the encounter, you have **+1 Advantage** on all **Action Resolutions.**

name: True Sight
description: While performing **Actions,** ignore the effects of **Stealth** abilities and **Concealment.**

name: Reliable Attacks
description:
Your **Attack Actions** without **Graze** have **On Miss:** Graze 2.

*(Graze activates On Damage effects, but not On Hit effects.)*

name: Guidance
description: When you perform the *Basic* **Aid Action,** you may have the chosen character become **Blessed** instead of the **Action's** other effects.

name: Read Intent
description:
This turn, your **Attack** and **Spell Actions** don't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

**Read Intent** doesn't trigger hostile **Reactions.**

name: Disorient
description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Dazed +1.**

name: Manipulate Fate
description: An allied character in **Range** immediately performs a *Basic* **Move Action** as a **Free Reaction.**

name: Prepared Heal
description:
**Condition:** You or an allied character within **Range 5** suffer damage.

**Effect â€” Focus Cost 2:** The damaged character receives [mag] **Healing** after the damage is dealt. A character that **Delayed** this round receives an additional **2 Healing.**

name: Revelation
description: An allied character in **Range** clears **Blinded, Stunned,** and **Dazed.** That character ignores **Concealment** until the end of their next turn.

name: Future Sight
description: Choose a **Size 1 Area** in **Range.** At the beginning of your next turn, hostile characters in that **Area** suffer [mag] Damage. Allied characters in the area receive **2 Healing,** plus **1 Healing** for each hostile character in the area. If no characters are in the area, recover **Focus** spent to perform **Future Sight.**

name: Misleading Vision
description: Target hostile character within **Range** makes a **Resistance Roll** or immediately performs a *Basic* **Move Action,** moving their full speed in a direction of your choice as a **Free Reaction.** *(This movement is voluntary, though you choose its direction.)*

name: Assurance
description:
Bind to an **Attack Action.** *(When you begin an encounter, choose an option from those available to you to bind this ability to.)*

The **Bound Attack** can't have net **Advantage** or **Disadvantage** and treats its target's **DEF** as 9.

name: Conceal Reality
description:
Choose a **Size 1 Area** in **Range.**

Until the end of your next turn: Characters in that area have **Concealment 3.**

**Sustain (2ap):** Move the area **2 tiles** in any direction.

name: Entelechy
description:
**Flurry**

**On Damage:** Another allied character within **Range** receives **Barrier** equal to the total **Damage** dealt.

**On Miss:** Graze 2. *(Applies On Damage effect.)*

name: Telepathic Bond
description:
**Condition:** An allied character within **Range** performs the **Refocus Action.**

**Effect â€” Focus Cost 3:** That character recovers **1 AP** and receives [mag] **Barrier.** It isn't lost as turns end this turn.

name: Grasp the Future
description:
An allied character within **Range** that isn't **Delaying** and hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes their turn. You can't perform **Reactions** during that turn.

Once that character's turn ends, your turn resumes if you have **Turn AP** remaining.

name: Rewind
description:
**Condition:** An allied character performs a non-Ultimate **Action,** and all other **Reactions** to that **Action** *(if any)* have been declared.

**Effect:** Undo the triggering **Action.** The triggering **Action** can't be performed again this turn. Any declared **Reactions** can't be performed again this turn.

*(When you Undo an Action, all effects of that Action, including damage and healing, are reversed, and any statuses and conditions inflicted by that Action are cleared.
